ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., ETR) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Software) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of stock (e.g., ETF, mutual fund) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange the stock is traded on (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the stock had its initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the stock belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded on the given date */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Hours during which the stock is traded (e.g., 9:30-16:00) */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (e.g., real-time, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical sectors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the industry belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector" (
  "stock_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-sector relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "sector_weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_industry" (
  "stock_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-industry relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "industry_weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industry_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industry_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value of the alert (e.g., price threshold) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the article is related to */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the analysis is for */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result (e.g., 0.8) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the prediction is for */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., 0.8) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the performance metric is for */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metric was calculated */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) of the stock */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
